Oh, Jaemin

something easy to forget

Blog About Archive Tags

memo

2020-02-08
  • latex

몇가지

texdoc package-name

to read documentation of $\LaTeX$ package ‘package-name’

\documentclass{beamer}

\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage{hyperref}

\title[About Beamer]{Let's Use Beamer}
\subtitle{example}
\author{Oh, Jaemin}
\institute{MY UNIV}
\date{\today}

\begin{document}

\frame{\titlepage}

\begin{frame}
	\frametitle{Title Page}
	Beamer is used to make presentation slide.
	
	See this \href{https://www.overleaf.com/learn/latex/Beamer}{link}.
\end{frame}

\end{document}

beamer is latex package to make presentation slide.

 Quotes 교수님과 만나다 
